title: vittaria pusilla var. wooroonooran
intro: Vittaria pusilla var. wooroonooran, also known as the Wooroonooran fern, is a type of leafy green plant native to the tropical regions of Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in Indigenous Australian medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vittaria pusilla var. wooroonooran include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce pain and inflammation, and aid in the healing of wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a poultice, infused in hot water as a tea, or applied topically as an oil or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
